title: Smart Egg Incubator
description: Design and construction of a prototype Smart Egg Incubator equipped with a microcontroller-based automatic temperature and humidity control system. This project includes an LCD display interface for real-time monitoring, an active ventilation system, and a self-contained chassis.

title: Water Level Control and Monitoring System
description: Collaborate in a team to build a physical water level control system. This project integrates a microcontroller, electronic relays, and a water pump mounted on an extruded aluminum frame to simulate an industrial-scale fluid automation system.
